Join the Movement
eco Tree Billionaire Generation

The True Wealth of the Future Will Be Measured in Trees

This is one of the central ideas behind BOS - a new, sustainable way of thinking about wealth. Trees provide oxygen, restore soils, regulate water, and offer food, medicine, fiber, and income.

Community Growth
14,208 Trees Planted

Why Trees?

Trees support biodiversity and help stabilize the climate, yet their true value is often overlooked.

co2

Life, Livelihoods, and Climate

Nature's most efficient technology for locking away atmospheric carbon, building solid wood from thin air.

park
air

Oxygen Engine

Trees provide oxygen, food, medicine, fiber, shelter, fertile soils, and habitat for countless organisms.

grass

Soil Restoration

Trees restore ecosystems, capture carbon dioxide, and help the land become a source of life and learning for generations.

water_drop

Water Regulation

Forests act as giant sponges, absorbing rainfall, preventing floods, and filtering water into pristine aquifers.

local_florist

Food & Medicine

Providing sustenance and traditional remedies. A diverse agroforestry system is a living pharmacy and pantry.

psychiatry

Bond with the Earth

At its heart, this is about bonding with trees. Growing trees becomes a pathway to happy living and prosperity for individuals, families, and communities.

About Us

Rooted in Tradition, Growing for the Future. The Bill of Senga is a sustainable living hub where indigenous knowledge meets modern agricultural science to build thriving ecosystems.

f X photo_camera in
